name: Hickory-Smoked Cheese Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Green Onion; Minced, Use All
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the cottage cheese and sour cream until smooth.
2. Gradually add the remaining ingredients while continuing to blend until well combined.
3. Cover the mixture and chill in the refrigerator.
Makes about 1 1/2 cups of dip.
Suggested Dippers: Potato Chips, Water Crackers, Ham, Mushrooms, Snow Peas
